all.title: Streamers on StreamArchive
all.description: Browse streamers on StreamArchive. Add your favourites and their live streams are recorded automatically. Watch TikTok, Twitch, YouTube, Bigo, Tango, and Kick recordings anytime.

tiktok.title: TikTok Streamers
tiktok.description: Browse TikTok streamers on StreamArchive. Add your favourites and their TikTok Lives are recorded automatically. Watch TikTok live recordings anytime — no screen recorder needed.

faqs.question: How do I save TikTok Lives on StreamArchive?
faqs.answer: Sign up free, add the TikTok username of any streamer you want to follow, and their TikTok Lives are recorded automatically every time they go live. No screen recorder needed — everything is saved in the cloud.

faqs.question: Can I watch TikTok Lives I missed?
faqs.answer: Yes. Once you add a TikTok streamer, all their Lives are recorded and saved to your account. You can rewatch any TikTok Live recording anytime through the built-in player.

faqs.question: Do I need a TikTok screen recorder?
faqs.answer: No. Stream Archive is a cloud-based TikTok live recorder. There's no app to install, no phone left running, and no black screen issues. TikTok Lives are captured server-side in high quality.

faqs.question: Can I download TikTok live recordings?
faqs.answer: Yes. Premium users can download any TikTok live recording as a video file for offline viewing.

faqs.question: Is Stream Archive free for saving TikTok Lives?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can sign up free and start saving TikTok Lives from your favourite streamers. Premium plans unlock downloading recordings and extended storage.

faqs.question: How many TikTok streamers can I add?
faqs.answer: Free users can add up to 3 streamers. Premium users can add up to 100 streamers across all platforms.

twitch.title: Twitch Streamers
twitch.description: Browse Twitch streamers on StreamArchive. Add your favourites and their streams are recorded automatically. Save Twitch VODs, download recordings, and never miss a stream.

faqs.question: How do I save Twitch streams on StreamArchive?
faqs.answer: Sign up free, add the Twitch username of any streamer you want to follow, and their streams are recorded automatically every time they go live. No software needed — recordings are saved in the cloud.

faqs.question: Can I watch Twitch streams I missed?
faqs.answer: Yes. Once you add a Twitch streamer, all their streams are recorded and saved. You can rewatch any Twitch recording anytime — unlike Twitch VODs, these recordings never expire.

faqs.question: How is this different from Twitch VODs?
faqs.answer: Twitch VODs expire after 14–60 days and can get muted or deleted. Stream Archive saves Twitch streams permanently — recordings never expire, stay in full quality, and are always available to watch or download.

faqs.question: Can I download Twitch stream recordings?
faqs.answer: Yes. Premium users can download any Twitch stream recording as a video file for offline viewing. A Twitch VOD downloader built into your account.

faqs.question: Is Stream Archive free for saving Twitch streams?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can sign up free and start saving Twitch streams from your favourite streamers. Premium plans unlock downloading recordings and extended storage.

faqs.question: Does it record all types of Twitch streams?
faqs.answer: Yes. Gaming, IRL streams, Just Chatting, or any other category — every Twitch stream is recorded automatically regardless of content type.

youtube.title: YouTube Streamers
youtube.description: Browse YouTube streamers on StreamArchive. Add your favourites and their YouTube Lives are recorded automatically. Watch YouTube live recordings anytime — save streams that replays miss.

faqs.question: How do I save YouTube Lives on StreamArchive?
faqs.answer: Sign up free, add the YouTube channel of any streamer you want to follow, and their Lives are recorded automatically every time they go live. No software needed.

faqs.question: Can I watch YouTube Lives I missed?
faqs.answer: Yes. Once you add a YouTube streamer, all their Lives are recorded and saved. You can rewatch any YouTube live recording anytime — even if the original replay was deleted or failed to process.

faqs.question: How is this different from YouTube replays?
faqs.answer: YouTube replays can fail to process, get deleted, or go private. Stream Archive saves YouTube Lives as an independent backup — recordings are always available regardless of what happens to the original.

faqs.question: Can I download YouTube live recordings?
faqs.answer: Yes. Premium users can download any YouTube live recording as a video file for offline viewing.

faqs.question: Is Stream Archive free for saving YouTube Lives?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can sign up free and start saving YouTube Lives from your favourite channels. Premium plans unlock downloading recordings and extended storage.

about.all:
## Save Your Favourite Live Streams

Live streams disappear when they end. Stream Archive is a cloud-based stream recorder that automatically saves live broadcasts from your favourite streamers — so you can rewatch and download them anytime.

### Automatic Stream Recording

Add your favourite streamers and their live streams are recorded automatically. No screen recorder needed, no software to install. Cloud recording runs 24/7 — streams are captured even when you're not watching.

### Rewatch and Download

Every recording is available instantly through the built-in player. Premium users can download recordings as video files for offline viewing.

### Multi-Platform Stream Recorder

Record live streams from TikTok, Twitch, YouTube, Kick, Bigo, Tango, AfreecaTV, and Pandalive — all saved in one place. The easiest way to archive your favourite streams across every platform.

### No Screen Recorder Needed

Unlike screen recording apps that require your device to stay on, Stream Archive records in the cloud. No dropped frames, no black screen issues, no storage filling up on your phone or computer.

### Free to Get Started

Create an account and start saving your favourite live streams today. Upgrade to premium to download recordings and unlock extended storage.
about.tiktok:
## Save TikTok Live Streams

TikTok Lives disappear the moment they end — there's no built-in way to save or rewatch them. Stream Archive is a TikTok live recorder that automatically saves TikTok Lives from your favourite streamers so you can rewatch them anytime.

### TikTok Live Recording — Automatic & Cloud-Based

Add any TikTok streamer and their Lives are recorded automatically in the cloud. No TikTok screen recorder needed, no phone left running overnight. Every TikTok Live is captured in high quality and saved to your account.

### Rewatch TikTok Lives Anytime

Missed a TikTok Live? No problem. Browse all saved TikTok live recordings, watch them instantly in your browser, or download them for offline viewing. Never miss your favourite TikTok streamer again.

### TikTok Live Recorder — No Screen Recording Required

Forget unreliable TikTok screen recording apps that cause black screens or low quality captures. Stream Archive records TikTok Lives server-side — no app to install, no storage issues, no screen recorder for TikTok needed.

### Browse TikTok Streamers

Discover popular TikTok streamers on Stream Archive. Browse their recorded Lives, catch up on streams you missed, and find new TikTok content worth watching.

### Free TikTok Live Recorder

Sign up free and start saving TikTok Lives from your favourite streamers today. Upgrade to premium for downloading TikTok recordings and extended storage.
about.twitch:
## Save Twitch Streams & VODs

Twitch VODs expire after 14–60 days and highlights get buried in hours of footage. Stream Archive is a Twitch stream recorder that automatically saves live streams from your favourite Twitch streamers — a permanent VOD archive that never expires.

### Twitch VOD Downloader & Stream Recorder

Add your favourite Twitch streamers and their live streams are recorded automatically. Every Twitch stream is saved to the cloud in high quality — no Twitch VOD expiry, no deleted archives. Your favourite Twitch content is preserved permanently.

### Rewatch Twitch Streams Anytime

Missed a Twitch stream? Browse all saved Twitch recordings, watch them instantly — no ads, no interruptions. Premium users can download Twitch VODs as video files for offline viewing.

### Twitch Stream Recorder — No Screen Capture Needed

Forget running screen capture software or desktop recording tools. Stream Archive is a cloud-based Twitch recorder that captures streams server-side. No extra CPU load, no Bandicam, no OBS recording. Twitch streams are saved automatically in high quality.

### Browse Top Twitch Streamers

Discover popular Twitch streamers on Stream Archive. Browse their recorded streams across gaming, IRL, and every category. Catch up on streams you missed and find new Twitch streamers to follow.

### Free Twitch Stream Recorder

Sign up free and start saving Twitch streams from your favourite streamers today. Upgrade to premium for downloading Twitch recordings and extended VOD storage.
about.youtube:
## Save YouTube Live Streams

YouTube live stream replays can disappear — streams fail to process, get deleted, or channels go private. Stream Archive is a YouTube live recorder that automatically saves live streams from your favourite YouTube channels so you can rewatch them anytime.

### YouTube Live Recording — Automatic & Cloud-Based

Add your favourite YouTube channels and their live streams are recorded automatically. Every YouTube Live is captured in high quality and saved to your account — even if the original replay gets deleted or fails to process.

### Rewatch YouTube Lives Anytime

Missed a YouTube Live? Browse all saved YouTube live recordings, watch them instantly in your browser, or download them for offline viewing. A reliable backup of every live stream.

### YouTube Live Recorder — No Screen Recording Needed

Forget traditional screen recording software for YouTube. Stream Archive is an online YouTube recorder that captures live streams server-side. No desktop app, no browser extension, no computer left running overnight.

### Browse YouTube Streamers

Discover popular YouTube streamers on Stream Archive. Browse their recorded Lives, catch up on streams you missed, and find new YouTube channels worth subscribing to.

### Free YouTube Live Recorder

Sign up free and start saving YouTube Lives from your favourite channels today. Upgrade to premium for downloading YouTube recordings and extended storage.

Bigo Lives disappear when they end, and screen recording apps often cause black screen issues. Stream Archive is a Bigo Live recorder that automatically saves streams from your favourite Bigo streamers — no black screen, no screen recorder needed.

Add your favourite Bigo streamers and their Lives are recorded automatically in the cloud. No Bigo Live screen recorder APK needed, no black screen issues. Streams are captured server-side in high quality.

### Rewatch & Download Bigo Recordings

Every Bigo Live recording is available to watch instantly. Premium users can download recordings as video files for offline viewing.

### Browse Bigo Streamers

Discover Bigo streamers on Stream Archive, watch their recorded Lives, and find new streamers to follow.

### Free Bigo Live Recorder

Create an account and start saving Bigo Lives from your favourite streamers today. No app to install, no black screen — just automatic cloud recording.
